# Positioning And Brand

## Positioning

For guests who need to inspect a public item without commitment, the product provides a calm, recoverable detail flow unlike account-first catalogs.

## Working Name

“Open Detail” is a fixture-only working name. Availability research and trademark clearance are not claimed.

## Voice

Use plain labels, explain failures without blame, and give the recovery action before technical detail.

## Visual Identity Direction

Quiet editorial hierarchy, strong content focus, and no mascot in the core inspection surface.

## Brand Lock

The user confirmed the positioning and working-name status for this fixture.
